info.title: Clicky Analytics API
info.description: Clicky web analytics API providing real-time analytics data including visitors, pageviews, actions, searches, links, and more. Uses a single endpoint with type parameter to select data type.

get.description: Main analytics endpoint. Use the 'type' parameter to select the data type. Returns data for the specified site, date range, and filters.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date or date range (e.g. today, yesterday, last-7-days, 2024-01-01,2024-01-31)

get.description: Get visitors analytics data. Equivalent to calling the main endpoint with type=visitors.
